full_markdown:
**GOVERNMENT OF INDIA**

**MINISTRY OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY**

**DEPARTMENT OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY**

**LOK SABHA**

**UNSTARRED QUESTION NO.408**

**TO BE ANSWERED ON 22/07/2015**

**NSF FOR HIGH SCHOOL STUDENTS**

**408.	SHRI D.S. RATHOD:**

**SHRI PARESH RAVAL:**

**SHRI DEVUSINH CHAUHAN:**

**Will the Minister of SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY 챵찾챨챙챨챨횖챨 징챨첩횥 횗횩챨첩횑챨챨첨챵짹챨짢챤처 횢챨체챘챨처**

**be pleased to state:**

**(a)		whether the Government proposes to organise national Science Fair (NSF) specially for the students especially high school students in the country;**

**(b)		if so, the details thereof and the locations identified for the purpose;**

**(c)		whether the Government also proposes to develop science education environment in the rural areas of the country; and**

**(d)		if so, the details thereof and the steps taken by the Government in this regard?**

**ANSWER**

**MINISTER OF STATE IN THE MINISTRY OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY AND MINISTER OF STATE IN THE MINISTRY OF EARTH SCIENCES**

**(SHRI.Y. S. CHOWDARY)**

**챵찾챨챙챨챨횖챨 징챨첩횥 횗횩챨첩횑챨챨첨챵짹챨짢챤처 횢챨체챘챨챨창챨횣챨 횢챨첨체 횥챨쨍횣챨 횢챨체챘챨처 +횋횋챔짰 횗챨철횈찾챨처 챵찾챨챙챨챨횖챨 횢챨체챘챨챨창챨횣챨 횢챨첨체 횥챨쨍횣챨 횢챨체챘챨처**

**(g횋횋횘 쨈횋횋<횉. A쨘횋. S횋횋챔v횋짰횋횘)**

**(a) to (d): The information is being collected and will be laid on the Table of the House.**

************
